case_title: CHIU KAN WONG ET AL VS. MICHAEL WILLIAM LOGAN

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO APPEARANCES.
NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES ARE MADE. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
